changeSet.author: avokadus725
changeSet.sql: IF NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys.indexes WHERE name = 'idx_rental_user_covering' AND object_id = OBJECT_ID('dbo.rental') ) BEGIN CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX idx_rental_user_covering ON dbo.rental (user_id) INCLUDE (scooter_id, start_time, end_time, total_cost, duration_minutes); END ELSE BEGIN DROP INDEX idx_rental_user_covering ON dbo.rental; CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX idx_rental_user_covering ON dbo.rental (user_id) INCLUDE (scooter_id, start_time, end_time, total_cost, duration_minutes); END

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_rental_user_covering ON dbo.rental;
